---
title: "pca_map_1"
author: "subhash"
date: "2025-08-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(maps)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggforce)
library(patchwork)
library(stringr)


# --- Load SAP metadata ---
sap_data <- read.csv("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/tpj15853-sup-0001-files1 (1).csv")[, c(1, 2, 5)]
colnames(sap_data) <- c("Pinumber", "cluster", "Country")
sap_cluster_names <- c("1" = "durra", "2" = "kafir", "3" = "caudatum",
                       "4" = "milo/durra-bicolor", "5" = "mixed/bicolor", "6" = "guinea")
sap_data <- sap_data %>%
  mutate(cluster = as.character(cluster),
         ClusterName = sap_cluster_names[cluster],
         Set = "SAP") %>%
  filter(!is.na(ClusterName)) %>%
  select(Pinumber, ClusterName, Set, Country)

# --- Load SorGSD metadata ---
sorgsd_data <- read_excel("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/13068_2021_2016_MOESM1_ESM (1).xlsx")
colnames(sorgsd_data) <- sorgsd_data[1, ]
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data[-1, c(1, 5, 6)] # PI, Country, cluster
colnames(sorgsd_data) <- c("Pinumber", "Country", "cluster")
sorgsd_data$cluster[sorgsd_data$cluster == "Weedy"] <- "Wild sorghum"
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data[sorgsd_data$cluster != "S.propinquum", ]
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data %>%
  mutate(ClusterName = case_when(
    cluster == "Improved" ~ "Improved",
    cluster == "Landrace" ~ "Landrace",
    cluster == "Wild sorghum" ~ "Wild sorghum",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ),
  Set = "SorGSD") %>%
  filter(!is.na(ClusterName)) %>%
  select(Pinumber, ClusterName, Set, Country)

# --- Combine metadata ---
all_meta <- bind_rows(sap_data, sorgsd_data)

# --- Load PCA ---
merged_pca <- read.table("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/pca.eigenvec", header = FALSE)
colnames(merged_pca) <- c("FID", "IID", paste0("PC", 1:(ncol(merged_pca) - 2)))

# --- Merge with metadata ---
pca_annotated <- inner_join(merged_pca, all_meta, by = c("IID" = "Pinumber"))

# --- Reassign Landrace & Improved to nearest SAP centroid ---
sap_centroids <- pca_annotated %>%
  filter(ClusterName %in% c("durra", "kafir", "caudatum",
                            "milo/durra-bicolor", "mixed/bicolor", "guinea")) %>%
  group_by(ClusterName) %>%
  summarise(PC1_mean = mean(PC1), PC2_mean = mean(PC2))

assign_to_sap <- function(pc1, pc2, centroids) {
  dists <- sqrt((centroids$PC1_mean - pc1)^2 + (centroids$PC2_mean - pc2)^2)
  centroids$ClusterName[which.min(dists)]
}

pca_annotated <- pca_annotated %>%
  mutate(ClusterName_new = ifelse(
    ClusterName %in% c("Landrace", "Improved"),
    mapply(assign_to_sap, PC1, PC2, MoreArgs = list(centroids = sap_centroids)),
    ClusterName
  ))

# --- Colors for 7 final groups ---
color_vec <- c(
  "durra" = "#FF7F00", "kafir" = "#ebff33", "caudatum" = "#984EA3",
  "milo/durra-bicolor" = "#F781BF", "mixed/bicolor" = "#A6A6A6", "guinea" = "#FF5733",
  "Wild sorghum" = "#4DAF4A"
)

# --- PCA variance ---
eigenvalues <- scan("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/pca.eigenval")
variance_explained <- eigenvalues / sum(eigenvalues) * 100
PC1_var <- variance_explained[1]
PC2_var <- variance_explained[2]

# --- PCA plot ---
pca_plot <- ggplot(pca_annotated, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = ClusterName_new)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_vec) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(PC1_var, 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(PC2_var, 1), "%)"),
    color = "Subpopulations"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

# --- Map pie chart ---
world <- map_data("world")
centroids <- world %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(long = mean(range(long)), lat = mean(range(lat)), .groups = "drop")

# Update country info for reclassification
map_df <- pca_annotated %>%
  left_join(centroids, by = c("Country" = "region")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(long))

cluster_counts <- map_df %>%
  group_by(ClusterName_new) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(ClusterName_new, " (n=", n, ")"))

pie_data <- map_df %>%
  group_by(Country, long, lat, ClusterName_new) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Country) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n),
         angle = 2 * pi * cumsum(prop),
         start = lag(angle, default = 0),
         end = angle,
         mid = (start + end)/2,
         r = 3)

map_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = world, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "white", color = "gray70") +
  geom_arc_bar(data = pie_data,
               aes(x0 = long, y0 = lat, r0 = 0, r = r,
                   start = start, end = end, fill = ClusterName_new),
               alpha = 0.5, color = "black", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_vec) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude")

# --- Combine ---
combined <- map_plot + pca_plot +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, widths = c(1, 1), heights = c(1.2, 1))

# Save high-res
ggsave("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/gwas_sap/graphs/Figure1_7subpops.png", combined, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 600)
ggsave("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/gwas_sap/graphs/Figure1_7subpops.pdf", combined, width = 12, height = 6)

```
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(maps)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggforce)
library(patchwork)
library(stringr)

# --- Load SAP metadata ---
sap_data <- read.csv("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/tpj15853-sup-0001-files1 (1).csv")[, c(1, 2, 5)]
colnames(sap_data) <- c("Pinumber", "cluster", "Country")
sap_cluster_names <- c("1" = "durra", "2" = "kafir", "3" = "caudatum",
                       "4" = "milo/durra-bicolor", "5" = "mixed/bicolor", "6" = "guinea")
sap_data <- sap_data %>%
  mutate(cluster = as.character(cluster),
         ClusterName = sap_cluster_names[cluster],
         Set = "SAP") %>%
  filter(!is.na(ClusterName)) %>%
  select(Pinumber, ClusterName, Set, Country)

# --- Load SorGSD metadata ---
sorgsd_data <- read_excel("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/13068_2021_2016_MOESM1_ESM (1).xlsx")
colnames(sorgsd_data) <- sorgsd_data[1, ]
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data[-1, c(1, 5, 6)] # PI, Country, cluster
colnames(sorgsd_data) <- c("Pinumber", "Country", "cluster")
sorgsd_data$cluster[sorgsd_data$cluster == "Weedy"] <- "Wild sorghum"
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data[sorgsd_data$cluster != "S.propinquum", ]
sorgsd_data <- sorgsd_data %>%
  mutate(ClusterName = case_when(
    cluster == "Improved" ~ "Improved",
    cluster == "Landrace" ~ "Landrace",
    cluster == "Wild sorghum" ~ "Wild sorghum",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ),
  Set = "SorGSD") %>%
  filter(!is.na(ClusterName)) %>%
  select(Pinumber, ClusterName, Set, Country)

# --- Combine metadata ---
all_meta <- bind_rows(sap_data, sorgsd_data)

# --- Load PCA ---
merged_pca <- read.table("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/pca.eigenvec", header = FALSE)
colnames(merged_pca) <- c("FID", "IID", paste0("PC", 1:(ncol(merged_pca) - 2)))

# --- Merge with metadata ---
pca_annotated <- inner_join(merged_pca, all_meta, by = c("IID" = "Pinumber"))

# --- Reassign Landrace & Improved to nearest SAP centroid ---
sap_centroids <- pca_annotated %>%
  filter(ClusterName %in% c("durra", "kafir", "caudatum",
                            "milo/durra-bicolor", "mixed/bicolor", "guinea")) %>%
  group_by(ClusterName) %>%
  summarise(PC1_mean = mean(PC1), PC2_mean = mean(PC2))

assign_to_sap <- function(pc1, pc2, centroids) {
  dists <- sqrt((centroids$PC1_mean - pc1)^2 + (centroids$PC2_mean - pc2)^2)
  centroids$ClusterName[which.min(dists)]
}

pca_annotated <- pca_annotated %>%
  mutate(ClusterName_new = ifelse(
    ClusterName %in% c("Landrace", "Improved"),
    mapply(assign_to_sap, PC1, PC2, MoreArgs = list(centroids = sap_centroids)),
    ClusterName
  )) %>%
  mutate(ClusterName_new = str_to_title(ClusterName_new)) # Capitalize

# --- Colors for 7 final groups (capitalized keys) ---
color_vec <- c(
  "Durra" = "#FF7F00", "Kafir" = "#ebff33", "Caudatum" = "#984EA3",
  "Milo/durra-bicolor" = "#F781BF", "Mixed/bicolor" = "#A6A6A6", 
  "Guinea" = "#FF5733", "Wild Sorghum" = "#4DAF4A"
)

# --- Order factor levels for legend ---
pca_annotated$ClusterName_new <- factor(
  pca_annotated$ClusterName_new,
  levels = c("Durra", "Kafir", "Caudatum", "Milo/durra-bicolor", 
             "Mixed/bicolor", "Guinea", "Wild Sorghum")
)

# --- PCA variance ---
eigenvalues <- scan("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Downloads/pca.eigenval")
variance_explained <- eigenvalues / sum(eigenvalues) * 100
PC1_var <- variance_explained[1]
PC2_var <- variance_explained[2]

# --- PCA plot ---
pca_plot <- ggplot(pca_annotated, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = ClusterName_new)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.5) + # 50% transparency
  scale_color_manual(values = color_vec) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("PC1 (", round(PC1_var, 1), "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", round(PC2_var, 1), "%)"),
    color = "Subpopulations"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

# --- Map pie chart ---
world <- map_data("world")
centroids <- world %>%
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(long = mean(range(long)), lat = mean(range(lat)), .groups = "drop")

map_df <- pca_annotated %>%
  left_join(centroids, by = c("Country" = "region")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(long))

pie_data <- map_df %>%
  group_by(Country, long, lat, ClusterName_new) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Country) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n),
         angle = 2 * pi * cumsum(prop),
         start = lag(angle, default = 0),
         end = angle,
         mid = (start + end)/2,
         r = 3)

map_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = world, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "white", color = "gray70") +
  geom_arc_bar(data = pie_data,
               aes(x0 = long, y0 = lat, r0 = 0, r = r,
                   start = start, end = end, fill = ClusterName_new),
               alpha = 0.5, color = "black", size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_vec) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  labs(x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude")

# --- Combine ---
combined <- map_plot + pca_plot +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2, widths = c(1, 1), heights = c(1.2, 1))

# Save high-res
ggsave("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/gwas_sap/graphs/Figure1_7subpops.png", combined, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 600)
ggsave("/Users/subhashmahamkali/Documents/gwas_sap/graphs/Figure1_7subpops.pdf", combined, width = 12, height = 6)

```
